label: Tier 1
summary: Advance immediately into shortlist review and live checks.

label: Tier 2
summary: Prioritise the next video or live scouting cycle.

label: Tier 3
summary: Keep active on the board and compare against stronger names.

label: Tier 4
summary: Track form and revisit when the brief or market changes.

label: Tier 5
summary: Do not progress now unless new information changes the case.
